---
title: PEMMSS Dashboard
format: dashboard
server: shiny
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
import os
import subprocess
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from shiny import render, ui, reactive
from shinywidgets import render_widget 
from ipyleaflet import Map  
plt.rcParams['font.size'] = 8
```

# Inputs

## {.sidebar}


```{python}
ui.input_action_button("btn", "Run Simulation", class_="btn-success")
simulation_completed = reactive.Value(0)
script_dir = os.getcwd()

input_files_path = Path(script_dir) / ".." / "input_files"

@reactive.effect
def run_pemmss():
    if input.btn() > 0:
        with reactive.isolate():
            output_dir = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "..", "output_files"))
            os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
            script_dir = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), ".."))
            os.chdir(script_dir)
            
            ui.modal_show(ui.modal("Running PEMMSS simulation...", easy_close=True, footer=None))
            result = subprocess.run(["python", "pemmss.py"], capture_output=True, text=True)
            if result.stderr:
                ui.modal_show(ui.modal(f"Error: {result.stderr}", easy_close=True, footer=None))
            else:
                ui.modal_show(ui.modal(ui.pre(result.stdout), easy_close=True, footer=None))
                simulation_completed.set(simulation_completed() + 1)  # Update the reactive value

@render.ui
def csv_inputs():
    try:
        csv_inputs = [f for f in os.listdir(input_files_path) if f.endswith('.csv')]
    except FileNotFoundError:
        csv_inputs = []
    if csv_inputs:
        select_input = ui.input_select("csv_input", "Input files:", choices=csv_inputs)
        open_button = ui.input_action_button("open_csv", "Open CSV")
        return ui.tags.div(select_input, open_button)
    else:
        return ui.div("No output folders found.")

@reactive.effect
def open_selected_csv():
    if input.open_csv() > 0:
        with reactive.isolate():
            selected_file_path = input_files_path / input.csv_input()
            if selected_file_path.exists():
                os.startfile(selected_file_path)
```


## Inputs

```{python}
@reactive.Calc
def load_csv():
    csv_input = input.csv_input()
    if csv_input:
        csv_path = input_files_path / csv_input
        return pd.read_csv(csv_path)
    else:
        return pd.DataFrame()

@render.data_frame
def editable_df():
    df = load_csv()
    return render.DataGrid(
        data=df,
        editable=True
    )

@editable_df.set_patch_fn
def _(*, patch: render.CellPatch) -> render.CellValue:
    csv_input = input.csv_input()
    if csv_input:
        csv_path = input_files_path / csv_input
        df = pd.read_csv(csv_path)
        df.iloc[patch["row_index"], patch["column_index"]] = patch["value"]
        df.to_csv(csv_path, index=False)
    return patch["value"]
```

# Outputs

:::{.sidebar}

```{python}
output_files_path = Path(script_dir) / ".." / "output_files"

@reactive.Calc
def selected_folder():
    simulation_completed()
    folder_input = input.folder()
    return folder_input if folder_input else None

@render.ui
def folder_ui():
    simulation_completed()
    if output_files_path.exists():
        folders = [f.name for f in output_files_path.iterdir() if f.is_dir()]
    else:
        folders = []
    
    if folders:
        return ui.input_select("folder", "Select Folder:", choices=folders)
    else:
        return ui.div("No output folders found.")

@reactive.Calc
def png_files():
    folder = selected_folder()
    simulation_completed()
    if folder:
        graphs_folder = output_files_path / folder / "_graphs"
        return [f for f in os.listdir(graphs_folder) if f.endswith('.png')] if graphs_folder.exists() else []
    else:
        return []

@reactive.Calc
def csv_files():
    folder = selected_folder()
    simulation_completed()
    if folder:
        input_files_folder = output_files_path / folder / "_input_files"
        return [f for f in os.listdir(input_files_folder) if f.endswith('.csv')] if input_files_folder.exists() else []
    else:
        return []

@reactive.Calc
def stats_files():
    folder = selected_folder()
    simulation_completed()
    if folder:
        stats_files_folder = output_files_path / folder / "_statistics"
        return [f for f in os.listdir(stats_files_folder) if f.endswith('.csv')] if stats_files_folder.exists() else []
    else:
        return []

@render.ui
def png_files_ui():
    files = png_files()
    simulation_completed()
    if files:
        return ui.input_select("png_file", "Plots:", choices=files)
    else:
        return ui.div("No PNG files found in the selected folder.")

@render.ui
def csv_files_ui():
    files = csv_files()
    simulation_completed()
    if files:
        return ui.input_select("csv_file", "Inputs:", choices=files)
    else:
        return ui.div("No CSV files found in the selected folder.")

@render.ui
def stats_files_ui():
    files = stats_files()
    simulation_completed()
    if files:
        return ui.input_select("stats_file", "Statistics:", choices=files)
    else:
        return ui.div("No CSV files found in the selected folder.")
```

:::

:::{.panel-tabset}

## Plots

```{python}
@render.image 
def image():
    selected_png = input.png_file()
    folder = input.folder()
    if selected_png and folder:
        full_path = output_files_path / folder / "_graphs" / selected_png
        img = {"src": str(full_path), "style": "max-width:100%; max-height:100%; object-fit:contain;"}
        return img
    else:
        return None
```

## Inputs

```{python}
@render.data_frame
def table_inputs():
    selected_csv = input.csv_file()
    folder = input.folder()
    if selected_csv and folder:
        full_path = output_files_path / folder / "_input_files" / selected_csv
        df = pd.read_csv(full_path)
        return df
    else:
        return None
```

## Statistics

```{python}
@render.data_frame
def table_stats():
    selected_csv = input.stats_file()
    folder = input.folder()
    if selected_csv and folder:
        full_path = output_files_path / folder / "_statistics" / selected_csv
        df = pd.read_csv(full_path)
        return df
    else:
        return None
```


## Maps

```{python}
from ipyleaflet import Map, GeoData, basemaps, LayersControl
import geopandas
@render_widget  
def map():

    countries = geopandas.read_file(geopandas.datasets.get_path('naturalearth_lowres'))

    m = Map(center=(52.3, 8.0), zoom=3, basemap=basemaps.Esri.WorldTopoMap)

    geo_data = GeoData(
        geo_dataframe=countries,
        style={'color': 'black', 'fillColor': '#3366cc', 'opacity': 0.05, 'weight': 1.9, 'dashArray': '2', 'fillOpacity': 0.6},
        hover_style={'fillColor': 'red', 'fillOpacity': 0.2},
        name='Countries'
    )

    m.add_layer(geo_data)
    m.add_control(LayersControl())

    return m
```

## Log

```{python}
@render.code
def log_text():
    selected_csv = input.stats_file()
    folder = input.folder()
    if folder:
        log_path = output_files_path / folder / "_statistics" / selected_csv
        try:
            with open(log_path, "r") as file:
                log_content = file.read()
            return log_content
        except FileNotFoundError:
            return "Log file not found."
    else:
        return "No folder selected."
```

:::
